amendment_policy: After either candidate implementation is run on observed development data, any change to this artifact makes the campaign exploratory and ineligible for an A9d freeze.

baseline.burn_pairing: same integer burn; no claim of draw-level common random numbers across different probability laws

alternating_renewal_marked_v1.amount: seasonal station/stratum/global-shrunk lognormal body, empirical-threshold generalized-Pareto excess, lag-one Gaussian-copula residual memory indexed by run position and antecedent dry gap
alternating_renewal_marked_v1.context: monthly wet/dry bivariate temperature residual law and stratum event-context law
alternating_renewal_marked_v1.event_marks: joint transformed-Gaussian duration/time-to-peak/peak-ratio law conditional on log depth, season harmonics, antecedent dry gap, and cold context
alternating_renewal_marked_v1.occurrence: observable alternating wet/dry semi-Markov state with month-of-spell-start discrete empirical-Bayes duration distributions on support 1..60 plus an explicit overflow bin

latent_regime_marked_v1.amount: state-season station/stratum/global-shrunk zero-inflated lognormal-tail emissions with lag-one residual memory
latent_regime_marked_v1.context: state-season joint temperature and event-context emissions
latent_regime_marked_v1.event_marks: joint transformed-Gaussian marks conditional on hidden state, depth, season harmonics, and cold context
latent_regime_marked_v1.occurrence: finite hidden semi-Markov state with empirical-Bayes dwell laws and state-transition law; every state has clipped interior wet probability in [0.02,0.98]
latent_regime_marked_v1.state: fit by Bernoulli/Gaussian HMM EM followed by canonical wet-probability/amount ordering and explicit Viterbi dwell estimation; observed wet/dry spells may cross hidden-state boundaries

fit.hierarchy: station within frozen primary stratum within global
fit.optimizer: deterministic bounded grid; no adaptive proposal after full-development access

gate_calibration.method: paired same-observed-law year-block and event bootstrap; maximum standardized absolute difference within family/horizon; registry absolute floor lower bound
gate_calibration.rng: NumPy Philox with SHA-256 domain a9c-null-v1 and replicate/family/horizon identity

monthly_reconciliation.quadrature: deterministic distribution recursion or 200000-path fit-only Monte Carlo with fixed a9c-reconciliation-v1 Philox identity

selection_rule: reject hard-infeasible, incomplete, or mandatory-stratum-ineligible fits
reject familywise material degradation in any mandatory family, stratum, or horizon
break exact tie by ascending candidate-class ID
